title: Advisor YAML Schema — canonical three-file contract for all spoke advisors
what: Every spoke advisor must have three files: (1) v1.0.0.yaml — versioned definition with mission, pilot_contract, and patterns; (2) active.yaml — version pointer read by AdvisorManager; (3) schedule.yaml — run cadence with run_budget_seconds and time_request block. The authoritative field reference is WAI-Spoke/advisors/schema/advisor-schema-v1.yaml.
why: Without this contract, advisors are directories — invisible to AdvisorManager and unschedulable by Ozi. The three-file contract makes advisors discoverable, activatable, and budget-aware across the fleet.
